name: Sarawak Oil Palms Bhd
summary: Sarawak Oil Palms Bhd is a Malaysia-based company primarily involved in the cultivation of oil palm, processing of fresh fruit bunches (FFB) into crude palm oil (CPO) and palm kernel (PK), and refining of CPO into refined palm oil products. The company's operations include oil palm plantations, milling facilities, and refining plants. Sarawak Oil Palms is headquartered in Sarawak, Malaysia.
